aria_keyboard_handler_exists.0: Interactive WAI_ARIA UI components must provide keyboard access

style_color_misuse.0: Combine color and descriptive markup to convey information
style_color_misuse.Potential_1: Verify color is not used as the only visual means of conveying information

a_text_purpose.0: Hyperlinks must have an accessible name for their purpose
a_text_purpose.fail_acc_name: Hyperlink has no link text, label or image with a text alternative

widget_tabbable_exists.0: Component must have at least one tabbable element
widget_tabbable_exists.fail_no_tabbable: Component with "{0}" role does not have a tabbable element

widget_tabbable_single.0: Components with a widget role must have no more than one tabbable element
widget_tabbable_single.potential_multiple_tabbable: Component with "{0}" role has more than one tabbable element

element_tabbable_visible.0: A tabbable element should be visible on the screen when it has keyboard focus
element_tabbable_visible.potential_visible: Confirm the element should be tabbable and if so, it becomes visible when it has keyboard focus

target_spacing_sufficient.0: The target must be sufficiently sized or spaced from other targets
target_spacing_sufficient.violation_spacing: Undersized target "{0}" does not have sufficient spacing of 12 CSS pixels from another target "{1}"

img_alt_valid.0: Images must have accessible names unless they are decorative or redundant
img_alt_valid.fail_no_alt: The image has neither an accessible name nor is marked as decorative or redundant

svg_graphics_labelled.0: A non-decorative SVG element must have an accessible name
svg_graphics_labelled.fail_acc_name: The SVG element has no accessible name

form_submit_button_exists.0: A <form> element should have a submit button or an image button
form_submit_button_exists.Potential_1: Verify the <form> element has a submit button or an image button

aria_form_label_unique.0: Each element with "form" role must have a unique label that describes its purpose
aria_form_label_unique.fail_label_not_unique: Multiple elements with "form" role do not have unique labels

input_label_exists.0: Each form control must have an associated label
input_label_exists.Fail_1: Form control element <{0}> has no associated label
input_label_exists.Fail_2: Form control with "{0}" role has no associated label

input_label_visible.0: An input element must have an associated visible label
input_label_visible.potential_placeholder_only: The ‘placeholder’ is the only visible label
input_label_visible.potential_no_label: The input element does not have an associated visible label

aria_id_unique.0: The ARIA property must reference a non-empty unique id of an existing element that is visible
aria_id_unique.Fail_1: The 'id' "{0}" specified for the ARIA property '{1}' value is not valid

form_interaction_review.0: User should be informed in advance when interacting with content causes a change of context
form_interaction_review.Potential_1: Verify that interacting with content will not open pop-up windows or change the active window without informing the user

form_label_unique.0: Form controls should have exactly one label
form_label_unique.Fail_1: Form control has more than one label

label_ref_valid.0: The 'for' attribute for a label should reference a non-empty, unique 'id' attribute of a valid element
label_ref_valid.fail_invalid: The value "{0}" of the 'for' attribute is not the 'id' of a valid element

combobox_popup_reference.Fail_combobox_collapsed_visible: The combobox 'aria-expanded' attribute is false, but the combobox popup is visible
